---
title: "Marguerite de La Tullaye"
subtitle: "PhD Researcher"
image: assets/img/profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla          # trestles / solana / marquee / broadside
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yourusername
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/yourusername
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:marguerite.delatullaye@gmail.com
---

Welcome to my personal website. I am a researcher at **XYZ University**,
working on natural language processing and computer vision.

Feel free to explore my [research](research.qmd) or download my [CV](cv.qmd).
